question:
I am quite new to Tekton.

I am facing an issue currently - replication of pods using tekton.

What I want to achieve?

  • I want to create a pipeline with two tasks.
selection_rationale: SO answer score 0. D1=3 D2=3 D3=2 D4=1 D5=3. G4 new coverage.

ground_truth.answer: Tidak ada yang namanya "replicas" dalam Tekton Pipelines. Sebuah Tekton Pipeline adalah serangkaian Tasks yang dieksekusi dalam sebuah <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Directed_acyclic_graph"
